scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.build:vue: cd ../../.. && node scripts/build.js shared compiler-core compiler-dom compiler-ssr -pf cjs && node scripts/build.js compiler-sfc compiler-vapor -f cjs && node scripts/build.js shared reactivity runtime-core runtime-dom runtime-vapor vue -f esm-bundler+esm-bundler-runtime && node scripts/build.js server-renderer -f esm-bundler
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:vdom && pnpm run build:vapor && pnpm run build:solid
scripts.build:dashboard-hydration: pnpm run build:dashboard-hydration:vdom:client && pnpm run build:dashboard-hydration:vdom:server && pnpm run build:dashboard-hydration:vapor:client && pnpm run build:dashboard-hydration:vapor:server && pnpm run build:dashboard-hydration:solid:client && pnpm run build:dashboard-hydration:solid:server && BENCH_SCENARIO=dashboard-hydration node scripts/prerender-hydration.mjs
scripts.build:static-heavy-hydration: pnpm run build:static-heavy-hydration:vdom:client && pnpm run build:static-heavy-hydration:vdom:server && pnpm run build:static-heavy-hydration:vapor:client && pnpm run build:static-heavy-hydration:vapor:server && pnpm run build:static-heavy-hydration:solid:client && pnpm run build:static-heavy-hydration:solid:server && BENCH_SCENARIO=static-heavy-hydration node scripts/prerender-hydration.mjs
scripts.build:static-heavy: pnpm run build:static-heavy:vdom && pnpm run build:static-heavy:vapor && pnpm run build:static-heavy:solid
scripts.build:localized-leaf: pnpm run build:localized-leaf:vdom && pnpm run build:localized-leaf:vapor && pnpm run build:localized-leaf:solid
scripts.build:conditional-branch: pnpm run build:conditional-branch:vdom && pnpm run build:conditional-branch:vapor && pnpm run build:conditional-branch:solid
scripts.build:component-fanout: pnpm run build:component-fanout:vdom && pnpm run build:component-fanout:vapor && pnpm run build:component-fanout:solid
scripts.build:dynamic-props-attrs: pnpm run build:dynamic-props-attrs:vdom && pnpm run build:dynamic-props-attrs:vapor && pnpm run build:dynamic-props-attrs:solid
scripts.bench:dashboard: pnpm run build && pnpm run measure:dashboard
scripts.bench:dashboard-hydration: pnpm run build:dashboard-hydration && pnpm run measure:dashboard-hydration
scripts.bench:static-heavy: pnpm run build:static-heavy && pnpm run measure:static-heavy
scripts.bench:static-heavy-hydration: pnpm run build:static-heavy-hydration && pnpm run measure:static-heavy-hydration
scripts.bench:localized-leaf: pnpm run build:localized-leaf && pnpm run measure:localized-leaf
scripts.bench:conditional-branch: pnpm run build:conditional-branch && pnpm run measure:conditional-branch
scripts.bench:component-fanout: pnpm run build:component-fanout && pnpm run measure:component-fanout
scripts.bench:dynamic-props-attrs: pnpm run build:dynamic-props-attrs && pnpm run measure:dynamic-props-attrs
scripts.bench:hydration:headless: BENCH_HEADLESS=1 BENCH_WARMUP_RUNS=5 BENCH_RUNS=15 pnpm run bench:hydration
scripts.bench:all:headless: BENCH_HEADLESS=1 BENCH_WARMUP_RUNS=5 BENCH_RUNS=15 pnpm run bench:all
